scripts.pretest: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans 2>/dev/null; docker compose up -d --wait && sleep 5
scripts.test: MYSQL_HOST=localhost MYSQL_PORT=3306 MYSQL_DATABASE=test_db MYSQL_USER=test_user MYSQL_PASSWORD=test_pw MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=test_root_pw node --test --test-timeout 120000 test.js
